scripts.test:aria:smoke: npx playwright test -c playwright.smoke.config.js tests/smoke-ui/wcag-dialog-chrome.spec.js tests/smoke-ui/wcag-live-regions.spec.js tests/smoke-ui/wcag-shortcuts.spec.js tests/smoke-ui/wcag-shortcut-map.spec.js

scripts.test:a11y:playwright:suite: npm run test:a11y:wcag && npm run test:a11y:reflow && npm run test:a11y:headings && npm run test:a11y:complex-descriptions && npm run test:a11y:menu-keyboard && npm run test:a11y:navigation-paths && npm run test:a11y:shortcuts && npm run test:a11y:shortcut-map && npm run test:a11y:live-regions

scripts.test:a11y:all: npm run test:a11y:phpunit:suite && npm run test:a11y:playwright:suite && npm run test:a11y:wcag:strict && npm run test:a11y:reflow:strict && npm run test:a11y:contrast && npm run test:a11y:contrast:strict && npm run test:a11y:lightpanda
